ground_truth.title: From Insurance Carrier to Consulting Firm: Which Path is Right for You?
ground_truth.main_content: Join Pinnacle Consultants as they give an overview of some of the different career paths available to actuaries, including the day-to-day work and career trajectory of an actuary at a traditional insurance carrier versus that of an actuary at a consulting firm. This Beyond the Classroom event was held on September 13, 2022 from 4:00-5:00pm EDT.
with: Join Pinnacle Consultants as they give an overview of some of the different career paths available to actuaries.
This includes the day-to-day work and career trajectory of an actuary at a traditional insurance carrier versus that of an actuary at a consulting firm.
From Insurance Carrier to Consulting Firm: Which Path is Right for You?
Pinnacle Actuarial Resources presents this Beyond the Classroom event.
